description.value: Murali Pneumatics is a dedicated supplier of high-quality pneumatic tools and components in Coimbatore, specializing in Festo brand products. They offer a comprehensive range including ISO cylinders like the DSBC series, and various pneumatic and air solenoid valves such as the VUWS and VUVS models, catering to diverse industrial automation needs.

💨 Reliable Compressed Air Preparation for Industrial Automation

The Festo MSB4-1/8:J2:M1 Air Preparation Combination Unit is designed for industries that need stable, clean, and regulated compressed air in compact pneumatic systems.

✅ Integrated Filter + Regulator + Lubricator
✅ 850 l/min Flow Rate
✅ G1/8 Pneumatic Connections
✅ Fully Automatic Condensate Drain
✅ Suitable for Packaging, Textile, Process & Cleanroom Applications
✅ Genuine FESTO Product

Perfect for OEM panels, machine builders, textile automation systems, CNC machines, and packaging lines across Coimbatore and South India.
